feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: remove these margins
entry.content:
Regarding the left and right margins that appear on a page created with SAPUI5, is there any way to reduce or remove these margins?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is there a way to delete session cookies after user logs out from Fiori launchpad?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement to delete session cookies after user logs out of Fiori launchpad. I found blogs for deleting session cookies from portal on logout but nothing specific for Fiori launchpad.

entry.title: need help in building walkthrough in BAS
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have imported the walkthrough of ui5 sdk in web ide by mistake. Earlier version of walkthrough was in web ide, it was now migrated to BAS. So, it has .yaml, npm too. npm has been installed but by mistake I imported the code in web ide. I need to rectify, I am doing the code in VS Studio.

 

Thanks

Kaushik

SAP UI5/Fiori

entry.title: How to create a RAP-based oData Service and use it in an existing Fiori app that is hosted on FLP?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I need your help in rebuilding an existing oData Service using RAP. We currently have some Fiori Apps on FLP which use data coming from the SAP CAR system. The oData services are based on xsodata files on SAP HANA tables. Due to an upcoming upgrade, we need to move the data outside the CAR HANA Layer in order for the apps to continue running. As a result, we would like to leverage RAP and create these tables directly in CAR and create new oData services based on those tables. Currently, when a user runs an app, they are prompted for their HANA credentials in order for the data to be retrieved, but that will now be different.

I must admit I don't have experience with CDS and RAP but based on what I read and saw, the solution steps should be somewhat like the following:

  1. Create the tables in CAR
  2. Create CDS Entity Views based on the tables
  3. Define the Entity behavior and implementation
  4. Create the Service Definition and Binding
  5. Publish the oData Service
  6. Edit the Fiori app to use the new oData Service

Now for my questions...

1. Is the outline above correct?

2. Can I use a managed implementation? If not, why? 

4. How can I define parameters for the Entities and expose them via the service?

3. Should I use a service binding that is UI or API? (I assume API since there is an existing app and I don't want to use Fiori Elements?)

4. How will users be authenticated and authorized to use the service? Is it based on the communication user that is defined for the API service binding?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP Fiori - hide URL field on Zebra Scanner
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,
we are using chrome browser on our Zebra scanner to open our Fiori apps.
A lot of space is used by the URL field. Is there a way to use Fiori apps on full screen or is there a way to hide the URL field on the scanner?

Thanks in advance!

Best Regards, 
Shiv

entry.title: SAP systemcopy - Public and private views in fiori app copied too or lost?
entry.content:
Hi SAP community,

Do public and private views created by our SAP users in Fiori Apps get copied too when a SAP systemcopy is perfomed?
Or are the views in the Fiori apps lost after the systemcopy?

 

Best regards,
Joyce Len

entry.title: Fiori Import sales Order - Custome Excel Template
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

We currently have the Import Sales Order (App ID F4293) application up and running in our production system. This is working fine by standard functionality, but our business users have requested an improvement. 

In Import Sales Order, there is a template that is downloaded and used by users to input their sales order data before being imported in the application. 

Certain Columns that are required need to be filled manually (since business copy pastes data from  a reference) 

*Sales Order (Temporary ID) and Item (Temporary ID) 

I have created a formula which auto fills these fields for the user.

Now the question is if there is a way to update the excel that is being downloaded from the fiori app and replace it with an updated one I have amended which includes this formula.

 

I have already reached out to our development team regarding this, but they are still familiarizing themselves with this process. Any helpful insight is much appreciated (where to look, transaction codes to visit)

entry.title: invoice save as completed coming from Ariba
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I would like to know if we have any integration or tools for invoices coming from Arias. I want them to be saved as complete, not as parked.

Can you help me with this?

entry.title: Can we operate fiori app in offline mode(Hybrid),when online then data should be synced?
Change CSS based on status value using Formatter Function XML View
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

I am asking question and similar which is already asked many times but not what I need help on...

I want to apply css class to control based on some status column value dynamically. I am using XML view and want to use Formatter function to check status and return CSS class name. This is not happening.

Wanted to know if this is even Possible with Formatter function. When I tried to change text using Formatter function it is working fine. I do not want to use Javascript to create these control dynamically and add Style...

Below is my current code:

<GenericTile header="{SHIP_TO_PARTY}" visible="true"  frameType="TwoByOne" class="Y">
<TileContent unit="" footer="{DOCKED_AT_DOOR}" >
                                <HBox class="sapUiTinyMarginTop">
                                    <VBox class="marginleft">
                                        <HBox>
                                            <VBox>
                                                <Text id="lbldate1” text="Enrolled Date" class="{path: 'DOCKED_AT_DOOR', formatter : '.formatter.formatColor'}"></Text>
                                            </VBox>
                                        </HBox>
                                    </VBox>
                                </HBox>
                            </TileContent>
                        </GenericTile>

 Formatter.js

sap.ui.define([], function () {
    "use strict";

    return {
        formatColor: function (v) {
            // if (v === "Y") {
            //  this.addStyleClass("green");
            // } else {
            //  this.addStyleClass("red");
            // }
            // return v;
            var sResult = "";
            if (v === 'Y') {
                sResult = "green";
            } return sResult;
        }
    };
});

Please help...

 

Thanks-

entry.title: FCV In Bank Accounts is Incorrect comparing to Trial Balance
entry.content:
Hello Dears 

My COCD Currency is EGP and bank Account Currency is USD 
for Example: i have 100 USD and each Dollar for 50 EGP so it should be 5000 EGP in My trial Balance under this Account 
It appears in Trial Balance and FBL3N with credit (-2500) And its Incorrect because i have debit 100 USD 

After A month it May 1 dollar = 52 EGP so how can make System Adjust the local and Trial Balance for that account once I changed the Rate? noting that i run FAGL_FCV For Gl Balances and nothing Changed in TB

Thanks In advance

entry.title: The use of Class CL_APS_BC_SCOPE_CHANGE_API is not permitted.
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm on the tutorial "Create SAP Fiori Launchpad Space and Page Templates" in Step 3 (Scope page and space templates). Create SAP Fiori Launchpad Space and Page Templates | SAP Tutorials

I copied the code to my newly created class ZCL_SCOPE_PAGE_SPACE_### and I got the following error: The use of Class CL_APS_BC_SCOPE_CHANGE_API is not permitted.

Line 18:  DATA(lo_scope_api) = cl_aps_bc_scope_change_api=>create_instance( ).

Thanks for your help!

BR, Stephan

entry.title: Using secondary data source in Fiori building blocks
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

I'm developing an app that has multiple data sources, the app is a List report floorplan that opens a dialog fragment with a macros:FilterBar component inside it.

The List report uses the default model pointing to /primaryService/MainEntity and the filterBar needs to consume /secondaryService/OtherEntity, however the filterBar component fails because is trying to find /OtherEntity in /primaryService path.

Is there a way to bind the dialog or the inner filterBar to use the secondaryModel?


Some code for context.

Dialog.fragment.xml

 

<core:FragmentDefinition  id="dialogFragment" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns:mvc="sap.ui.core.mvc" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros" >
    <Dialog title="Custom Form" id="formDialog">
        <!-- Other unrelated fields -->
        <macros:FilterBar filterChanged="handler.onFilterChange" id="FilterBar" metaPath="/OtherEntity/@com.sap.vocabularies.UI.v1.SelectionFields" />
    </Dialog>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

 

button.js - function that opens the modal

 

async function openModal(oEvent) {
    const oView = this.editFlow.getView();
    const oController = oView.getController();
    const extension = oController.getExtensionAPI()
    var oModel = this.getModel("secondaryModel");
    oView.setModel(oModel, "secondaryModel");
    const initialBindingContext = new sap.ui.model.Context(oModel, "/OtherEntity")
    oView.setBindingContext(initialBindingContext, "secondaryModel")
    let dialog = await extension.loadFragment({
        contextPath: "/OtherEntity",
        id: 'fragmentDialogId',
        name: "jobui.ext.fragment.FormDialog",
        controller: this,
        initialBindingContext: initialBindingContext
    })
    oView.addDependent(dialog)
    dialog.open()
}

 

 manifest.json (simplified)

 

{
    "sap.app": {
      "dataSources": {
        "mainService": {
          "uri": "odata/mainService/",
          "type": "OData",
          "settings": {
            "annotations": [],
            "odataVersion": "4.0"
          }
        },
        "secondaryService": {
          "uri": "/odata/secondaryService/",
          "type": "OData",
          "settings": {
            "odataVersion": "4.0"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "sap.ui5": {
        "": {
          "dataSource": "mainService",
          "preload": true,
          "settings": {
          }
        },
        "secondaryModel": {
          "dataSource": "secondaryService",
          "preload": true,
          "settings": {
        }
    } 
  }

entry.title: fiori elements of worklist and list report page under service modeler copy functionality not dispaly
entry.content:
In SAP fiori elements of list and worklist page after line items and selection fields both the applications.after that in service modeler copy functionality was not displaying in VS Code and BTP. all sap ui version in manifest file is 

"minUI5Version": "1.130.0",
 
 

Here is the reference picture where i can see the copy functionality.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Application Generator: How to connect to a bearer authenticated OData Service?
entry.content:
I have been experimenting with generating applications using the SAP Fiori Application Generator npm extension. I do not face any issue connecting to my locally run mock OData service during step 2: connect to a data source, which does not require any authentication.

However, the extension only seems to support connecting to an OData service that has been set up with basic authentication (i.e. requires a username and password). However, my live OData service has been set up with bearer authentication.

I have the following questions:

  1. How can I connect to my bearer authenticated OData service using the SAP Fiori Application Generator extension?
  2. If this isn't possible, how can I manually set up my app to support this?

entry.title: CAP Forbidden error, multiple batch requests - CAP Authorization
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am testing CAP authorization, I have created a role 'VIEWER' and granting read access only to users with this role. I didnt assign this role, but generally we got Forbidden error in one request. I see it is sending multiple batch requests for forbidden and it is never ending.

 @(restrict: [
         {
             grant: 'READ',
             to   : 'Viewer'
         },

entry.title: Can we use BTP Application URL as an API.
entry.content:
Hi, After deploying project in BTP CAPM.
We got one Application URL that URL, I want to use as an API.
Is it possible, If it is. Then please provide some Idea and Blog.

entry.title: No function imports available for the selected entity type, of list report selecting entity type
entry.content: No function imports available for the selected entity type, error displaying in list report and worklist of fiori elements application when selecting the add action button through guided development. tryed with all the entity sets in the service. using northwind oData service of v2 version

entry.title: how to Get logged in User details in custom SAP FIORI from ECC
entry.content:
I am working on retrieving user details in my Fiori app. The backend system is ECC 6.0, and I am using OData for communication.

any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: HTML5 App published but not showing in Work Zone Content Manager
entry.content:
Hi,

I followed the following tutorial on the trial account to publish my Incident Management App created using Business Application Studio, while testing the CAP development, as made from the previous tutorials of this one:

Deploy to CF 

Everything went as expected, my cf apps command in then BAS  Terminal returning the 2 apps, as in the screenshot of the tutorial, and my cf services  command returns 4 services, because HANA Cloud has been moved from space to subaccount section.

 

However, I still do not see my app within the Content Manager of Work Zone, as mentioned in the following tutorial:

Integrate with Work Zone 

 

What could be the reason?

 

Following are the screenshots of my Role Collections, Subaccount Instances, CF Space and Work Zone Content Manager.

 

Thanks in advance.
